t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Passthrough from Fact_MarketPageViews.RealCID (renamed).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added ETL context; core description verbatim

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Salesforce CRM Account record ID (18-char Salesforce ID). Links the trading account to the SF Account. NULL if not yet synced.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Salesforce CRM Account record ID (18-char Salesforce ID). Links the trading account to the SF Account. NULL if not yet synced. Post-load UPDATE from Dim_Customer.SalesForceAccountID via JOIN on CID=RealCID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added ETL context; core description verbatim

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Dim_Instrument. Financial instrument being traded. Passthrough from Fact_MarketPageViews.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Primary key from Trade.Instrument'; replaced 'Identifies the tradeable instrument pair' with 'Financial instrument being traded' (likely copied from Dim_Position wiki instead of Dim_Instrument wiki)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Forex, 2=Commodity, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Asset class identifier from Dim_Instrument. 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. Passthrough from Dim_Instrument via JOIN on InstrumentID.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'From IMD (InstrumentMetaData)' source; dropped 4 enum values (3=CFD, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options); changed labels (Forex→Currencies, Commodity→Commodities)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE in production. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Full/canonical symbol, UNIQUE in production. Used for instrument lookup. Primary identifier in Security Ops API. Passthrough from Dim_Instrument.SymbolFull (renamed to InstrumentName).

issues.problem: Paraphrased Tier 1 description: dropped 4 enum values (3=CFD, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options), changed labels (Forex→Currencies, Commodity→Commodities), dropped 'From IMD (InstrumentMetaData)' source attribution. Must use Dim_Instrument wiki verbatim.

Paraphrased Tier 1 description: 'Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair.' replaced with 'FK to Dim_Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.' Writer appears to have sourced from Dim_Position wiki instead of Dim_Instrument wiki.
Missing UC Target row in property table — standard completeness item.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section (P1–P5). Footer says 11/14 phases but doesn't itemize which were completed.
The 'current month not previous month' caveat is documented in business logic and gotchas but could be more prominent in the element description with a warning prefix.
